ab: i djuma ti vuvu a vavayan.
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: izua, na taqed i umaan ti madju
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: i djuma ti vuvu a vavayan.
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: neka, djawvayvayiq ti madju, nu masulem i mangdjez.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: i djuma ti vuvu auqaljay
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: i vavaw a nikay ti madju, saw i vavaw kemin djay madju.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: izua cawcaw i djuma?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: ui, kadruy! cuacuay anga ini a pacun dja nusun, na talivaq sun.
ch: B:是kadruy阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s kadruy. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: nanguwanguwa lja! mangedjez ake a kizepezepan dja nu sun.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: i nuan a su kama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: i ta kakesanan a seman djamadjamay ti madju, vayika ken a djemaulj djay madju.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: maynu anga ti pengay.
en: Where did pengay go?

ab: vayiq anga sema puvuyuvuyuan djemepeq ta vuyu ti madju
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: vuvu u’aljay mangedjez anga men.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ini a idjumaq a nu vuvu a u’aljay, i suyding ti madju, i djumaq mun a kemaljava ta sipangedjez ni madju.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: mangedjezanga sun ama.
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: ini a mapacun na cuacuay anga, meqacanga sun.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: na maleva varung pacuna tu mangedjezanga sun.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: aycu a pangudralj sinipavay dja numun, padjingu pasata pingsiyang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: awmay cuwacuayanga ini a mangedjez, ku djawljaw a mapuljat sa maciwli a keman.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: maya ma’udjaw anga, temeqel aken ta uca sakamaya, idu sema keting djen a mazazepzep.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: maljimalji ta su kiniljevakan, uri vaykanga ken.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: aycu a vuyu djaw vucien, ta su kacuin sa galjuannga a keman.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
